plugins.name: observepoint-revenue
plugins.description: ObservePoint revenue-team tooling: find-accounts (ranked in-territory prospects), research-account (scored ICP dossier), owned-properties (discover an org's web properties), scope-calculator (page count to live price to proposal + evidence workbook), branding-guide (brand source of truth, doc maker, checker, drift watch), op-mcp-post-mortem (report & remediate OP MCP defects), and salesforce-core (shared read-side Salesforce foundation: org map + sf_io).
